titleStmt.title: SII 5.588: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 588. (A.R. No. 31 of 1895). ON THE BASE OF THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
matiraikoṇṭa kopparakecaripanma (ma)ṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 5 Āvatu tiruney
ttāṉa śrīkārya m Ārāykiṉṟa pavatāya ṉakkaṉār śrī(ri)mukaṅ kuṇan tu muṉ Ārāy
kiṉṟārai koḷ Eḻutukaveṉṟu nakaravāriya kūṭṭañ cāṟṟa vārāviṭṭārai
varakoṇṭa taṇṭappoṉ 10 2� Ippoṉ de varkku paṭṭaṅkoṭṭi Iṭṭatu
nittapuyaṅkaṉ tirumuṭikkuḷḷa nāḷ nāḻikku nellup patakkum koṭi Ēṟik kaṭṭuvāṉukku nellu kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum patipātamula pāku Uṇṇa Iraṇṭiṉāl Uṭaiya poṉ patiyār Aṅkiṉālum paṉṉiṉ Aṅkiṉālum Uṭaiya poṉ pūcaṉai Irukaḻañcum Ākappoṉ 2�
Ippoṉ Irukaḻañce mukkāluṅ koṇṭu Ittiruviḻāt tiruvicākam Ēḻunāḷuñ ceyvomāṉom patipātamulattom Iv tiruviḻāk kallil veṭṭiṉapaṭi periya koyilil Arddhamaṇḍa pattil teṉmāṭṭil vācalil meṟkaṭaiya Uttirattilum potikaiilum viṟkaṇṭattilum vā
calil kiḻakkil namaṉamaṇṭapattuḷ teṉmāṭṭi jakatiilum paṭṭikai Iṉmelum paṭṭikai Iluṅ kaṇṭattilum Itaṉkiḻaikkumutattilum Āka Ivaiykācit tiruviḻāppuṟam veṭṭiṉapaṭi kaṇṭukoḷka Ivvaikācit tiruviḻāppaṟaṅ kaṇṭeṉ kavarāmoḻi mātevaṉeṉ Idharmma m rakṣittār śrīpātatūḷi Eṉṟa(l)lai me(l)litu Ippaṭi vaikāci vicākattiruviḻā tavirntu Ippokammey koṇṭu cittirai pa
ttu tiruviḻā ceyvitāka Itu panmā heśvara ra kṣaiAt the commencement of another line is found the following:— śrī aṭi yeṉ śīrassi n itu pa nmāheśva ra [ra]kṣai kāttārum irakṣai ||—....
Digital edition of SII 5.588 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
